goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 promoted 转正 apply 预检入口

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 canary promoted 预检入口
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.ts 只读 preflight CLI/函数和 focused tests。它读取 catty_memory_canaries 与 catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions，筛出已经是 promotable、已有 persisted promotable decision 且包含 proposedMemory 的 canary，预览未来真正 promoted writer 会执行的 user memory 写入、catty_memory_audit promotion evidence 写入和 canary status 更新。src/catty/README.md 同步新增模块、运行命令和 dry-run 边界。
summary.why: 前序切片已经有 canary queue、future eval、promotion preview、promotion decision audit 和 planned -> promotable/blocked 状态写入；要继续靠真实 dogfood 推进 memory admission，需要在真实 user memory writer 之前加一层显式 apply 预检，先把 required evidence、would-be side effects 和 forbidden side effects 透明化，避免把 canary eval 结果直接写成长期 memory。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 promoted 转正 apply 预检入口

decisions.chose: 只做 promoted apply dry-run/preflight，不实现真实 user memory writer。
decisions.rationale: v0 仍要保持 prediction/judgement/canary 与用户长期 memory 的边界；preflight 先证明未来写入需要的证据和 side effect 口径。
rejected: 直接把 promotable canary 写成用户长期 memory
把 canary status 更新到 promoted
接入 heartbeat 或 nightly runner

decisions.chose: ready 只接受 currentStatus=promotable、persisted decision=promotable、且 decision 带 proposedMemory 的 canary。
decisions.rationale: 这要求 canary 已经过 future dogfood、promotion decision audit 和 status transition 三层证据，避免 planned/blocked 或缺少 proposed memory 的条目进入转正预检。

decisions.chose: 把非 promotable status、缺失 decision、blocked decision、缺失 proposedMemory 分别作为 blocked reason 输出。
decisions.rationale: 后续 agent 可以从 preflight 结果直接判断下一步是等 status transition、补 decision audit、处理 blocked reason，还是补 proposed memory，而不是重新推断状态。

decisions.chose: 把 preflight 报告的 proposed overlaps 分类为同一 catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 这些 intents 分别完成 trail、judge、store、shadow、judge-record、memory-candidates、canary queue/eval/promotion/decision/status；本轮建立在它们之上，不反向改变核心决策。

rejected.alternative: 在本轮实现真正 promoted writer
rejected.reason: 会跨过用户长期 memory 写入和 audit 写入的高风险边界；当前目标是先让写入计划可审计。

rejected.alternative: 复用 transition --write 来执行 promotable -> promoted
rejected.reason: transition 写入层当前只负责 planned -> promotable/blocked；promoted 需要 user memory 和 catty_memory_audit side effects，必须单独设计。

rejected.alternative: 默认运行时调用模型或接调度
rejected.reason: apply preflight 是纯状态读取和审计预览，不需要模型，也不能污染 60s heartbeat。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 本轮只预览 side effects，不写用户长期 memory。
preflight 不写 catty_memory_audit，测试验证 existing audit 不变。
没有模型调用路径，也没有改 launchd heartbeat/nightly runner。
CLAUDE.md 是既有无关 dirty，未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录。
没有读取或输出 ~/.agents/memory/config.json、API key、cookie 或 payload_json。

review_notes: 验证：canary/promotion 相关 tests 22 pass，166 expect。
验证：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，42 pass，278 expect。
CLI smoke：bun src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.ts --help 输出 usage；默认 dry-run 在 live DB 上返回 totalCanaries=0、readyToPromote=0、blocked=0。
验证：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 通过。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，full pipeline ok/throttled。
提交 e32f4f2 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.test.ts；未 push，未开 PR。

subsystems: Catty v0 memory canary promoted apply preflight
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has a dry-run preflight layer between promotable canary status and any future real user memory writer.
Promoted apply readiness depends on both queue status and persisted promotion decision audit, not on recomputing canary evaluation ad hoc.
The preflight explicitly separates would-be side effects from forbidden dry-run side effects so future writer work has a narrow boundary.
Actual user memory promotion remains intentionally unimplemented.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.ts emits dry-run JSON for live or selected --store-db state.
previewMemoryCanaryPromotionApply returns ready plans for promotable canaries with persisted promotable decisions and proposedMemory.
Non-promotable statuses, missing decisions, blocked decisions, and missing proposedMemory are returned as blocked preflight items with reasons.
Dry-run does not mutate catty_memory_canaries.status, catty_memory_audit, decision rows, or user memory.
security_implications: The command reads only Catty canary queue and promotion decision audit tables through existing list helpers.
No secrets, API keys, cookies, ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, model providers, or heartbeat paths are touched.
The preflight is read-only and does not write user memory, catty_memory_audit, or canary status.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the command only reads existing catty_memory_canaries and catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions when present.
Missing canary or decision tables return empty dry-run output through existing missing-table-safe list helpers.
